curation.synopsis: The Blood Ravens dispatch a company of Space Marines to the embattled worlds of the Aurelia sub-sector, where Imperial defences are buckling under a sustained ork invasion. Captain Davian Thule leads his warriors from world to world, blunting the greenskin assault and hunting their warlords across war-torn frontier planets. But as the Blood Ravens push deeper into enemy territory, they uncover a far greater horror stirring behind the ork tide: the Tyranids, the great devourer, whose hive fleets threaten to consume everything the Chapter has fought to save. From squad-level skirmishes to a desperate company-wide stand, the marines must hold the line against two relentless foes.

flags.reason: Aurelia sub-sector is the established game setting; individual world names in the novelisation not confirmed in sources
